mapper.select: SELECT * FROM volunteer_schedule WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} ORDER BY day_of_week, CASE time_slot WHEN 'MORNING' THEN 1 WHEN 'AFTERNOON' THEN 2 WHEN 'EVENING' THEN 3 END

SELECT vs.*, u.full_name as volunteerName FROM volunteer_schedule vs INNER JOIN sys_user u ON vs.volunteer_id = u.id WHERE vs.is_available = 1 AND vs.confirm_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'PENDING') AND u.role_type = 'VOLUNTEER' ORDER BY vs.day_of_week, vs.time_slot
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO volunteer_schedule (volunteer_id, day_of_week, time_slot, is_available, assign_source, confirm_status, reject_reason) VALUES (#{volunteerId}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{timeSlot}, #{isAvailable}, #{assignSource}, #{confirmStatus}, #{rejectReason})
mapper.select: SELECT vs.*, u.full_name as volunteerName FROM volunteer_schedule vs INNER JOIN sys_user u ON vs.volunteer_id = u.id WHERE vs.day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek} AND vs.time_slot = #{timeSlot} AND vs.is_available = 1 AND vs.confirm_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'PENDING') AND u.role_type = 'VOLUNTEER'
